metadata.description: Open Health OS. Integrate diet, exercise, sleep, weight — all health data on one open-source platform.

hero.subtitle: An open Health OS — diet, exercise, sleep, weight, all in one platform

philosophy.quote2: shouldn't be scattered across ten apps.
philosophy.desc1: Open Health is an open Health OS,
philosophy.desc2: integrating diet, exercise, sleep, and weight on one platform.
philosophy.tagline: Not another tracking app. It's your Health OS.

features.desc01: Diet, exercise, sleep, weight, water, fasting — no more juggling multiple apps. One platform covers all aspects of health, with data naturally connected.
features.desc02: Photo-recognize nutrition labels, AI coach analyzes your health data and gives personalized advice. Let technology serve your health.
features.desc03: Weight trends, nutrition intake, sleep quality, exercise performance — all at a glance. Make better decisions with an integrated perspective.
features.desc04: Your data is entirely yours, no lock-in, no paywalls. Open-source architecture, community-driven, anyone can contribute and extend.

install.title: Download Open Health
install.subtitle: Choose the best way for you to start tracking your health.
install.appStoreDesc: Native experience for iPhone and iPad, in development.
install.playStoreDesc: Native experience for Android, in development.
install.pwaDesc: No app store needed, install directly to your home screen.
install.ios02: Tap the share button at the bottom
install.android02: Tap the menu button ⋮ at the top right

blog.title: Health Knowledge Base
blog.subtitle: In-depth content on nutrition science, training methods, and sleep optimization.
